name: review-architeture
when_to_use: When you need to review an architecture specification before it is committed.
When the TUI should synchronously inspect the architecture spec for weak entity or relationship modeling.

steps.description: Review the system specification context first.
steps.details: Start with the system spec so the architecture review stays anchored to the intended behavior.

steps.description: Run `powdrr-lift evaluate-architecture-specification --work-item-name <work-item-name> --entity-type <type> ...` on the filled template.
steps.details: Validate the template before judging the quality of the entity model itself.

steps.description: Check entities, relationships, invariants, and guidance for missing references or weak structure.
steps.details: Confirm that every explicit reference points at a listed entity and that the model is not over- or under-specified.

steps.description: Report findings and repeat the review until the architecture spec validates cleanly.
steps.details: Give the user a concrete list of issues to fix and rerun the review after the edits land.
